Defines a system loop function that calls a blink function and prints a status message.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that defines a function named [`sysloop`](<#pebble-firmware/src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/targets/mbed/js/mainsysloop>) which takes a parameter `ticknow`. The function calls another function `blink`, although the implementation of `blink` is not included in this file. After defining the function, the script prints the message "main js OK" to the console. The script provides narrow functionality, primarily serving as a basic framework for a system loop that triggers the `blink` function.
